content.speakerText: Thanks so much! Have a great day!
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢！祝你今天愉快！
expectedAnswers: Thanks! Have a wonderful day as well!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否正确回应了对方的祝福
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，如使用'You too'而非'I'm fine'
表达自然度：是否符合日常口语习惯，避免生硬或翻译腔

content.speakerText: Your payment has been processed. Is there anything else I can help you with?
content.speakerTextCn: 您的付款已处理完毕，还有什么我可以帮您的吗？
expectedAnswers: No, that's all. Thank you, goodbye!
No thanks, have a nice day!
Everything's fine. See you next time!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确结束交易并礼貌告别
语言准确性：是否使用正确动词搭配（e.g., 'that's all', 'see you next time'）
关键词覆盖：是否包含付款完成后的关键词（goodbye, thank you, next time）
